  1. org.jscience.social.philosophy

Uses of Class
org.jscience.social.philosophy.Concept

Packages that use Concept
Package
Description
org.jscience.social.philosophy
Provides support for philosophy, including formal logic, ethics, epistemology, and storytelling.

  • Uses of Concept in org.jscience.social.philosophy

    Methods in org.jscience.social.philosophy that return types with arguments of type Concept
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Set<Concept>
    Concept.getAllConcepts()
    Recursively retrieves all reachable concepts from this concept.
    Set<Concept>
    Model.getAllConcepts()
    Retrieves all unique concepts, including those related to the direct concepts in this model, through recursive traversal.
    Set<Concept>
    PhilosophicalCurrent.getAllConcepts()
    Retrieves all concepts associated with this current by aggregating concepts from all its models.
    Set<Concept>
    Model.getConcepts()
    Returns an unmodifiable set of direct concepts in this model.
    Set<Concept>
    Belief.getRelatedConcepts()
     
    Set<Concept>
    Concept.getRelatedConcepts()
    Retrieves the set of directly related concepts.
    Methods in org.jscience.social.philosophy with parameters of type Concept
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Model.addConcept(Concept concept)
    Adds a concept to the model.
    void
    Belief.addRelatedConcept(Concept concept)
     
    void
    Concept.addRelatedConcept(Concept concept)
    Adds a relation to another concept.
    void
    Model.removeConcept(Concept concept)
    Removes a concept from the model.
    void
    Concept.removeRelatedConcept(Concept concept)
    Removes a relation to another concept.
